nasb.text: And they *came to Bethsaida. And they *brought a blind man to Jesus and *implored Him to touch him.

esv.text: And they came to Bethsaida. And some people brought to him a blind man and begged him to touch him.

cnv.text: 後來他們到了伯賽大，有人帶了一個瞎眼的人到他跟前，求耶穌摸他。

ccb.text: 他们到了伯赛大，有人带来一个瞎子，求耶稣摸他。

csbs.text: 他们来到伯赛达，有人带来一个瞎眼的，恳求耶稣摸他。
